problem id: 6ecc51b1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01111001 -> 01000111
  01101010 -> 00010110
  01010011 -> 10100101
  00100101 -> 00001011
  01110000 -> 11110111
  01001101 -> 10000110
  01001110 -> 11010110
  01001000 -> 01110110
  00000101 -> 00001111

query: 10010100
predicted answer: 00101101
